green.use: primary brand green; buttons, accents, active states

gold.use: warm highlight; CTA on dark backgrounds

fonts.sans: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
fonts.note: Body/UI = sans. Editorial quotes = serif italic. The logo wordmark typeface ships inside the logo art — do not recreate it with system fonts.
